property.description_en: Livrichy Real Estate Brokerage LLC offers you this 2BR for Sale in Bahar JBR. Property Details: - 2 Bedrooms - 3 Bathrooms - 1 Parking Space - Low floor - Spacious layout - Community view - Community swimming pool - Children's pool and playing area - Fully equipped gym - Custom Designed Interiors - Prime Location Jumeirah Beach Residence (JBR) is a premier beachfront development located along the pristine coastline of Dubai Marina. This dynamic community features 40 towers, offering a mix of high-end residential apartments, penthouses, and five-star hotels. With a prime location along a 1.7-kilometer stretch of Dubai's coastline, JBR offers spectacular views of the Arabian Gulf, Palm Jumeirah, and the iconic Bluewaters Island. JBR is famous for its bustling lifestyle, with The Walk and The Beach as two of its most popular destinations. The Walk is a vibrant promenade filled with retail outlets, cafes, and restaurants, offering a cosmopolitan lifestyle with diverse shopping and dining experiences. The Beach, an outdoor leisure complex, features water sports, an open-air cinema, a wide range of dining options, and direct access to the beach. JBR combines luxury living with a family-friendly environment. It offers a range of amenities, including landscaped parks, children's play areas, gyms, and swimming pools. Its prime location ensures residents have easy access to the metro, tram, and Sheikh Zayed Road, making JBR a highly desirable location for both residents and visitors alike.

property.title_en: Golf Views | High Floor | Multiple Unit Options 2BR
property.description_en: Livrichy Real Estate Brokerage LLC is happy to offer you a 2BR Apartment in Golf Heights Emirates Hills for SALE. Property Details: - Attractive Payment Plan - Handover: 2026 - Streets lined with flowering gardens and trees - Featuring breathtaking examples of independent architecture and views - Away from the hustle and bustle of the city, with the laid-back suburban lifestyle Easy Access: - 5 minutes to Metro Station - 5 minutes to Dubai Marina Mall - 10 minutes to The Beach - 30 minutes to Dubai International Airport Amenities: - Children’s play area - Swimming pool - Fully equipped gym - Tennis court GOLF HEIGHTS is set to be the new luxurious residential tower at the heart of the vibrant, family-centric neighborhood engulfed in greenery; EMIRATES LIVING, THE BEVERLY HILLS of DUBAI ! Emirates Living offers a serene nature-filled sanctuary, with 8,659 premium villas nestled within 52.2 million square feet of lush greenery. Featuring tree-lined streets and pathways, attractively landscaped lakes, blooming gardens and recreation areas, the community is the perfect haven for those looking to escape the bustling city life and enjoy the relative peace and quiet of suburban living. Restaurants and cafes, football, basketball and tennis courts, children’s play areas, and three dog parks provide you with an unparalleled array of entertainment options, right at home in the neighbourhood. Adding to the available leisure choices, the community is in close proximity to health centres, schools, nurseries, a petrol station, grocery stores, clubs, mosques, fitness facilities, a golf course, retail centres, banks, and even a 5-star hotel, all kept safe and monitored by 24-hour security.

property.title_en: Fully Furnished | Spacious Layout | Fully Upgraded
property.description_en: Livrichy Real Estate Brokerage LLC offers you this 2BR for Rent in Bahar JBR. Property Details: - 2 Bedrooms - 3 Bathrooms - Vacant on 12th Dec 2024 - 1 Parking Space - Low floor - Spacious layout - Community view - Community swimming pool - Children's pool and playing area - Fully equipped gym - Custom Designed Interiors - Prime Location Jumeirah Beach Residence (JBR) is a premier beachfront development located along the pristine coastline of Dubai Marina. This dynamic community features 40 towers, offering a mix of high-end residential apartments, penthouses, and five-star hotels. With a prime location along a 1.7-kilometer stretch of Dubai's coastline, JBR offers spectacular views of the Arabian Gulf, Palm Jumeirah, and the iconic Bluewaters Island. JBR is famous for its bustling lifestyle, with The Walk and The Beach as two of its most popular destinations. The Walk is a vibrant promenade filled with retail outlets, cafes, and restaurants, offering a cosmopolitan lifestyle with diverse shopping and dining experiences. The Beach, an outdoor leisure complex, features water sports, an open-air cinema, a wide range of dining options, and direct access to the beach. JBR combines luxury living with a family-friendly environment. It offers a range of amenities, including landscaped parks, children's play areas, gyms, and swimming pools. Its prime location ensures residents have easy access to the metro, tram, and Sheikh Zayed Road, making JBR a highly desirable location for both residents and visitors alike.

AlJurf Gardens is a lovely setting to come together: with courtyard-style architecture, mosques, and a community centre. It feels like a place of connection. Something you rarely find in a city.

property.description_en: Livrichy Real Estate Brokerage LLC happy to offer you this 3BR Townhouse in Marbella in Mina Al Arab Ras Al Khaima Property Details: - 3BHK - Beachfront home on Hayat Island, Mina Al Arab, RAK; - Ready to move in; - 3135 sq ft (291 sq m); - Fully furnished - Selling price - 3,295,000 aed (negotiable). - Maid's Room - Community View - Pool Access - Near Schools - Beach Access - Play Area - Near Markets Marbella Villas is a waterfront project on Hayat Island with fascinating public areas and amenities, which include a wide array of dining, retail, entertainment, promenades, walkways, parks, playgrounds and events space set neat the Arabian Sea. Marbella Villas offers spacious luxury 2-, 3-, 4- & 5-bedroom villas and townhouses with extraordinary services and comforts. The Island features exciting water aspects, a fantastic waterfront promenade, seafront dining and retail, scenic cycle and pedestrian paths, all revolving around a prime position and spectacular vistas that surrounds it. Enjoy a relaxing lifestyle, culture and beautiful waterfront scenery. Built upon modern Mediterranean influences and a truly Emirati ambience. Marbella Villas offers a secure gated community adjacent to the Intercontinental Hotel beach resort, spa and restaurants.
